all.en: My college friend Daniel surprised me with two tickets to a rock concert.
all.zh: 我大學朋友丹尼爾出其不意地送了我兩張搖滾演唱會的門票。

all.en: The band was one we used to listen to constantly in our dorm room.
all.zh: 那個樂團是我們以前在宿舍裡天天聽的。

all.en: On the night of the show, we arrived at the venue two hours early.
all.zh: 演唱會當晚，我們提前兩小時抵達場地。

all.en: The line outside stretched around the entire block, full of excited fans.
all.zh: 場外的人龍繞了整個街區，全是興奮的粉絲。

all.en: We bought matching T-shirts and glow sticks from the merchandise booth.
all.zh: 我們在周邊商品攤買了一樣的T恤和螢光棒。

all.en: Once inside, we squeezed our way closer to the stage during the opening act.
all.zh: 進場後，我們趁著暖場樂團表演時，往舞台前擠近一些。

all.en: When the main band finally appeared, the entire crowd erupted into cheers.
all.zh: 當主秀樂團終於登場時，全場觀眾發出震天的歡呼聲。

all.en: Daniel and I screamed every lyric until our voices grew hoarse.
all.zh: 我和丹尼爾大聲唱著每一句歌詞，直到喉嚨都嘶啞了。

all.en: The lights, the bass, and the energy of the fans were unforgettable.
all.zh: 燈光、低音與粉絲的熱情，都讓人難以忘懷。

all.en: During the encore, the singer thanked everyone for sticking with the band.
all.zh: 安可時，主唱感謝大家一路以來對樂團的支持。

all.en: On the train home, we agreed it was the best night of the year.
all.zh: 在回家的火車上，我們一致認為這是今年最棒的一晚。

all.en: The following morning, both of us woke up with terribly sore throats.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我們兩個都帶著嚴重沙啞的喉嚨醒來。

all.en: Daniel sent me a video he had secretly recorded during the encore song.
all.zh: 丹尼爾傳給我一段他在安可曲時偷偷錄下的影片。

all.en: Watching it again, I could hardly believe how loud the crowd had been.
all.zh: 再次觀看時，我幾乎無法相信當時觀眾有多麼震耳欲聾。

all.en: We posted a few photos online and instantly received many jealous comments.
all.zh: 我們上傳了幾張照片，馬上收到許多羨慕的留言。

all.en: My boss noticed my hoarse voice and laughed when I explained the reason.
all.zh: 我的主管注意到我嘶啞的嗓音，聽完原因後笑了出來。

all.en: Daniel suggested we start saving money for the band's tour next summer.
all.zh: 丹尼爾提議我們開始存錢，為了樂團明年夏天的巡迴演出。

all.en: He even printed out a calendar to track every announced concert date.
all.zh: 他甚至印了一份月曆，用來追蹤每一個公布的演唱會日期。

all.en: I framed the concert ticket and hung it above my desk at the office.
all.zh: 我把演唱會門票裱框，掛在辦公室的桌子上方。

all.en: My coworkers asked about it whenever they walked past my small cubicle.
all.zh: 每當同事經過我的小隔間，他們都會問起這張票。

all.en: That single night had clearly turned both of us into superfans once more.
all.zh: 那一夜顯然讓我們兩個再次變回了超級粉絲。
